name: Aparna Sivanandam
description: Mini-Hymba: Hybrid Attention + SSM heads on recurrent layers 3-5, with learnable meta tokens and tied cross-layer KV projections. Novel architecture contribution from Yingyan (Celine) Lin's EIC Lab (Georgia Tech) Hymba paper (arXiv:2411.13676, ICLR 2025).
notes: 134 steps, sequential SSM scan (torch.compile disabled). Full 4550-step run on 8xH100 with parallel SSM scan pending compute grant.
